member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.AIGuard
member.summary: Main orchestrator class for AIGuard.NET validation.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuard.#ctor(AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline,AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AIGuard class.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuard.CreateBuilder
member.summary: Creates a builder to construct an AIGuard instance.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuard.ExecuteAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates both input and output.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuard.ValidateInputAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the given input content against input validators.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuard.ValidateOutputAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the given output content against output validators.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuard.RedactPiiAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Convenience method for redacting PII from text.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuard.CheckContentSafetyAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Convenience method for checking content safety.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder for constructing an AIGuard instance.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder.AddValidator``1
member.summary: Adds a validator of the specified type with default configuration.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder.AddValidator``1(System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Adds a validator of the specified type and configures it.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder.AddValidator(AIGuard.NET.Validators.IGuardValidator)
member.summary: Adds a specific validator instance.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder.WithOptions(System.Action{AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions})
member.summary: Configures the AIGuard options.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder.WithStopOnFirstFailure(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures whether to stop on the first validation failure.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder.WithMaxRetries(System.Int32)
member.summary: Configures the maximum number of retries.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder.WithTimeout(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Configures the timeout for validation.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder.WithAuditLog(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures whether audit logging is enabled.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder.WithMinConfidence(System.Double)
member.summary: Configures the minimum confidence threshold for validation results.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds the AIGuard instance.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the AIGuard validation pipeline.
member.remarks: Configure these values via the builder's fluent API methods such as WithStopOnFirstFailure, WithMaxRetries, etc. All properties carry production-safe defaults.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions.StopOnFirstFailure
member.summary: When , the pipeline will stop executing remaining validators as soon as a validator returns an invalid result. Default: .

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions.DefaultThreatAction
member.summary: The default action to take when a threat or policy violation is detected and no validator-specific action has been configured. Default: .

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions.MaxRetries
member.summary: Maximum number of automatic retries when a transient validator failure occurs. Default: 0 (no retries).
member.remarks: Retries apply to validators that throw exceptions, not to validation failures. The pipeline will wait a short back-off period between retries.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions.Timeout
member.summary: Maximum wall-clock time the pipeline is allowed to spend executing all validators before cancellation is requested. Default: 30 seconds.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions.EnableAuditLog
member.summary: When , the pipeline emits structured audit-log entries for every validation run. Default: .

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions.MinConfidenceThreshold
member.summary: The minimum confidence score (0.0–1.0) a validator must report for a validation result to be considered meaningful. Results below this threshold are treated as inconclusive and logged as warnings. Default: 0.7.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions.OnViolationDetected
member.summary: Optional callback invoked each time a reports one or more violations. Useful for telemetry, alerting, or external audit sinks.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Audit.AuditEntry
member.summary: Represents an entry in the AI guard audit log.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Audit.AuditEntry.#ctor(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,System.String,System.String,AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult,System.TimeSpan,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Represents an entry in the AI guard audit log.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Audit.AuditLogger
member.summary: Orchestrates writing audit entries to multiple sinks.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Audit.AuditLogger.LogAsync(AIGuard.NET.Audit.AuditEntry,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Logs an entry to all configured sinks.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Audit.ConsoleAuditSink
member.summary: An audit sink that writes formatted entries to the console.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Audit.FileAuditSink
member.summary: An audit sink that appends JSON serialized audit entries to a file.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Audit.IAuditSink
member.summary: Defines a destination for audit logs.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Audit.IAuditSink.WriteAsync(AIGuard.NET.Audit.AuditEntry,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes an audit entry to the sink.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Audit.IAuditSink.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Flushes any buffered audit entries to the underlying storage.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.AttackType
member.summary: Classifies the type of prompt injection or adversarial attack detected.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.AttackType.InstructionOverride
member.summary: An attempt to override or replace the system-level instructions given to the AI model.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.AttackType.SystemPromptExtraction
member.summary: An attempt to extract or reveal the system prompt or hidden instructions.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.AttackType.RoleImpersonation
member.summary: An attempt to impersonate a privileged role (e.g., "You are now DAN") to bypass restrictions.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.AttackType.ContextManipulation
member.summary: An attempt to manipulate the conversation context to alter model behavior.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.AttackType.PayloadInjection
member.summary: An attempt to inject executable or structured payloads (e.g., code, SQL, markup) into the prompt to exploit downstream processing.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.AttackType.JailbreakAttempt
member.summary: A general jailbreak attempt designed to circumvent the model's safety alignment.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.AttackType.Unknown
member.summary: An attack type that could not be classified into a known category.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.ContentSafetyResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a content safety analysis, with per-category scores and a list of categories that exceeded the configured safety threshold.
member.param: Whether the content is considered safe based on the configured threshold.
Per-category safety scores, each normalized between 0.0 (safe) and 1.0 (most unsafe). Keys are category names (e.g., "hate", "violence", "sexual", "self-harm").
The set of category names that exceeded the safety threshold.
The overall safety risk score, normalized between 0.0 (safe) and 1.0 (most unsafe).

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Models.ContentSafetyResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Double)
member.summary: Represents the result of a content safety analysis, with per-category scores and a list of categories that exceeded the configured safety threshold.
member.param: Whether the content is considered safe based on the configured threshold.
Per-category safety scores, each normalized between 0.0 (safe) and 1.0 (most unsafe). Keys are category names (e.g., "hate", "violence", "sexual", "self-harm").
The set of category names that exceeded the safety threshold.
The overall safety risk score, normalized between 0.0 (safe) and 1.0 (most unsafe).

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ContentSafetyResult.IsSafe
member.summary: Whether the content is considered safe based on the configured threshold.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ContentSafetyResult.CategoryScores
member.summary: Per-category safety scores, each normalized between 0.0 (safe) and 1.0 (most unsafe). Keys are category names (e.g., "hate", "violence", "sexual", "self-harm").

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ContentSafetyResult.FlaggedCategories
member.summary: The set of category names that exceeded the safety threshold.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ContentSafetyResult.OverallScore
member.summary: Gets the overall score clamped to the [0, 1] range.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult
member.summary: Represents the aggregate result of running all validators in a guard pipeline.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets or sets whether all validations passed successfully.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult.SanitizedInput
member.summary: Gets or sets the sanitized input (if modified by validators like PII redaction).

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult.ValidatedOutput
member.summary: Gets or sets the validated output.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult.InputValidations
member.summary: Gets or sets the input validation results.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult.OutputValidations
member.summary: Gets or sets the output validation results.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult.Elapsed
member.summary: Gets or sets the elapsed time for the validation.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult.RetryCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of retries attempted.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult.HasInputViolations
member.summary: Gets whether there are any input violations.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult.HasOutputViolations
member.summary: Gets whether there are any output violations.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult.AllViolations
member.summary: Gets all violations across both input and output.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntity
member.summary: Represents a single PII entity detected within content.
member.param: The classification of the PII entity.
The original, unredacted value found in the content.
The redacted or masked replacement value (e.g., "***-**-1234" for an SSN).
The zero-based character index where the entity starts in the original text.
The character length of the original entity value.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntity.#ctor(AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntityType,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a single PII entity detected within content.
member.param: The classification of the PII entity.
The original, unredacted value found in the content.
The redacted or masked replacement value (e.g., "***-**-1234" for an SSN).
The zero-based character index where the entity starts in the original text.
The character length of the original entity value.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntity.Type
member.summary: The classification of the PII entity.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntity.OriginalValue
member.summary: The original, unredacted value found in the content.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntity.RedactedValue
member.summary: The redacted or masked replacement value (e.g., "***-**-1234" for an SSN).

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntity.StartIndex
member.summary: The zero-based character index where the entity starts in the original text.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntity.Length
member.summary: The character length of the original entity value.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntityType
member.summary: Identifies the type of personally identifiable information (PII) detected in content.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntityType.Email
member.summary: An email address (e.g., user@example.com).

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntityType.Phone
member.summary: A phone number in any recognized format.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntityType.SSN
member.summary: A U.S. Social Security Number (SSN).

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntityType.CreditCard
member.summary: A credit or debit card number.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntityType.IpAddress
member.summary: An IPv4 or IPv6 network address.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntityType.DateOfBirth
member.summary: A date of birth.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntityType.Address
member.summary: A physical or mailing address.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntityType.Custom
member.summary: A custom, user-defined PII entity type.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiRedactionResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a PII redaction operation, containing the sanitized text and details of all detected PII entities.
member.param: The original, unmodified input text.
The text after all detected PII entities have been redacted.
The collection of PII entities that were detected and redacted.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiRedactionResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiEntity})
member.summary: Represents the result of a PII redaction operation, containing the sanitized text and details of all detected PII entities.
member.param: The original, unmodified input text.
The text after all detected PII entities have been redacted.
The collection of PII entities that were detected and redacted.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiRedactionResult.OriginalText
member.summary: The original, unmodified input text.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiRedactionResult.SanitizedText
member.summary: The text after all detected PII entities have been redacted.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiRedactionResult.DetectedEntities
member.summary: The collection of PII entities that were detected and redacted.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.PiiRedactionResult.HasDetections
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether any PII entities were detected in the original text.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.ThreatAction
member.summary: Specifies the action to take when a threat or policy violation is detected.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.ThreatAction.Allow
member.summary: Allow the content to pass through without modification.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.ThreatAction.Block
member.summary: Block the content entirely and prevent further processing.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.ThreatAction.Sanitize
member.summary: Sanitize the content by removing or redacting the offending portions.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.ThreatAction.Log
member.summary: Log the threat for auditing purposes but allow the content to proceed.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext
member.summary: Provides contextual information to validators during validation execution.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext.Default
member.summary: Gets a default, empty validation context.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext.OriginalInput
member.summary: Gets or sets the original input prompt sent to the AI model.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext.ModelId
member.summary: Gets or sets the model identifier (e.g., "gpt-4", "claude-3").

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext.ConversationId
member.summary: Gets or sets the conversation or request identifier for correlation.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext.Metadata
member.summary: Gets the additional metadata dictionary for extensibility.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext.Items
member.summary: Gets the items dictionary for passing data between validators in a pipeline.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a validation operation performed by a single validator.
member.param: Whether the validation passed.
An optional summary message describing the result.
A confidence score between 0.0 and 1.0 indicating how confident the validator is in its result. A value of 1.0 means absolute certainty. Values outside the range are automatically clamped.
The name of the validator that produced this result.
The list of violations detected during validation, if any.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String,System.Double,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationViolation})
member.summary: Represents the result of a validation operation performed by a single validator.
member.param: Whether the validation passed.
An optional summary message describing the result.
A confidence score between 0.0 and 1.0 indicating how confident the validator is in its result. A value of 1.0 means absolute certainty. Values outside the range are automatically clamped.
The name of the validator that produced this result.
The list of violations detected during validation, if any.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult.IsValid
member.summary: Whether the validation passed.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult.Message
member.summary: An optional summary message describing the result.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult.ValidatorName
member.summary: The name of the validator that produced this result.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult.Violations
member.summary: The list of violations detected during validation, if any.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult.Confidence
member.summary: Gets the confidence score, clamped to the [0, 1] range.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult.Pass(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a passing validation result with no violations and full confidence.
member.param: The name of the validator.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult.Fail(System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationViolation})
member.summary: Creates a failing validation result with the specified message and violations.
member.param: The name of the validator.
A summary message describing the failure.
The confidence score for the failure determination (defaults to 1.0).
The list of violations detected. If null, an empty list is used.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationViolation
member.summary: Represents a specific rule violation detected during validation.
member.param: The name or identifier of the rule that was violated.
A human-readable description of the violation.
The severity of the violation on a continuous scale from 0.0 (informational) to 1.0 (critical). Values outside the range are automatically clamped.
An optional suggestion for how to fix or remediate the violation.
The optional zero-based character position in the content where the violation starts.
The optional length (in characters) of the offending content span.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationViolation.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Represents a specific rule violation detected during validation.
member.param: The name or identifier of the rule that was violated.
A human-readable description of the violation.
The severity of the violation on a continuous scale from 0.0 (informational) to 1.0 (critical). Values outside the range are automatically clamped.
An optional suggestion for how to fix or remediate the violation.
The optional zero-based character position in the content where the violation starts.
The optional length (in characters) of the offending content span.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationViolation.Rule
member.summary: The name or identifier of the rule that was violated.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationViolation.Description
member.summary: A human-readable description of the violation.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationViolation.SuggestedFix
member.summary: An optional suggestion for how to fix or remediate the violation.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationViolation.Position
member.summary: The optional zero-based character position in the content where the violation starts.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationViolation.Length
member.summary: The optional length (in characters) of the offending content span.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationViolation.Severity
member.summary: Gets the severity of the violation, clamped to the [0, 1] range.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidatorType
member.summary: Specifies when a validator should be applied in the AI pipeline.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidatorType.Input
member.summary: Validates input content before it is sent to the AI model.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidatorType.Output
member.summary: Validates output content received from the AI model.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidatorType.Both
member.summary: Validates both input and output content.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline
member.summary: Core pipeline engine that orchestrates the ordered execution of instances against textual content.

remarks.para: Validators are partitioned by and executed in ascending . Input validators run before output validators when is called.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AIGuard.NET.Validators.IGuardValidator},AIGuard.NET.AIGuardOptions,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline})
member.summary: Initializes a new .
member.param: The ordered collection of validators to execute. Must not be .
Pipeline configuration options.
Optional logger instance. When , a no-op logger is used.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline.ExecuteAsync(System.String,AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes both input and output validators against the supplied content. Input validators run first (ordered by ), followed by output validators.
member.param: The text to validate.
Optional carrying additional metadata. A default context is created when .
Cancellation token.
member.returns: A summarising the full pipeline run.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline.ValidateInputAsync(System.String,AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs only the input-side validators (those with or ).
member.param: The text to validate as input.
Optional validation context.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: A with only input validation results populated.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline.ValidateOutputAsync(System.String,AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs only the output-side validators (those with or ).
member.param: The text to validate as output.
Optional validation context.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: A with only output validation results populated.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline.RunValidatorsAsync(AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidatorType,System.String,AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs the validators matching in ascending order, applying retry logic, confidence filtering, and early-termination.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline.ExecuteWithRetryAsync(AIGuard.NET.Validators.IGuardValidator,System.String,AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a single validator with retry semantics.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline.CreateTimeoutCts(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a linked that will cancel after the configured .

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline.BuildGuardResult(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult},System.Collections.Generic.List{AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationResult},System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Builds the final from the collected validation results.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Pipeline.GuardPipeline.LogAudit(AIGuard.NET.Models.GuardResult)
member.summary: Emits a structured audit-log entry for a completed pipeline run.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Validators.IGuardValidator
member.summary: Defines the contract for an AI guard validator.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Validators.IGuardValidator.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of validator (Input, Output, or Both).

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Validators.IGuardValidator.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the validator.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Validators.IGuardValidator.Order
member.summary: Gets the execution order of the validator. Lower values run first.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Validators.IGuardValidator.ValidateAsync(System.String,AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the given content.
member.param: The content to validate.
The validation context.
Cancellation token.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Input.PiiRedactionValidator
member.summary: Detects and flags personally identifiable information (PII) in the input.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Input.PiiRedactionValidator.EmailRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}\\b
Explanation:
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Match a character in the set [%+-.0-9A-Z_a-z] atomically at least once.
○ Match '@'.
○ Match a character in the set [-.0-9A-Za-z] greedily at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Za-z|] greedily at least twice.
○ Match if at a word boundary.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Input.PiiRedactionValidator.SsnRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\b\\d{3}-\\d{2}-\\d{4}\\b
Explanation:
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 3 times.
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 2 times.
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match if at a word boundary.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Input.PromptInjectionValidator
member.summary: Detects prompt injection attacks in the input content.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Input.EstimationMethod
member.summary: Methods for estimating token counts.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Input.EstimationMethod.CharBased
member.summary: Uses character count divided by 4 as a rough estimation.

member.name: F:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Input.EstimationMethod.WordBased
member.summary: Uses word count multiplied by 1.3 as a rough estimation.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Input.TokenBudgetValidator
member.summary: Enforces a token limit on the input content.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Output.JsonSchemaValidator
member.summary: Validates that the model output is valid JSON and matches a specific JSON Schema.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Output.JsonSchemaValidator.GenerateSchemaFromType``1
member.summary: Generates a basic JSON Schema from a C# type (stub implementation).

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Output.ResponseLengthValidator
member.summary: Validates that the response length falls within specified character or word limits.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Output.ToxicityValidator
member.summary: Detects toxic, harmful, or policy-violating content in model outputs.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Validators.Output.TypeSchemaValidator`1
member.summary: Validates that the model output can be deserialized into type T and passes data annotations validation.

member.name: T:AIGuard.NET.Validators.ValidatorBase
member.summary: Abstract base class for all validators in the AIGuard.NET pipeline. Provides common structure including name, type, and execution order.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Validators.ValidatorBase.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of this validator. Defaults to the type name.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Validators.ValidatorBase.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of this validator, indicating whether it validates input, output, or both.

member.name: P:AIGuard.NET.Validators.ValidatorBase.Order
member.summary: Gets the execution order of this validator within the pipeline. Lower values execute first.

member.name: M:AIGuard.NET.Validators.ValidatorBase.ValidateAsync(System.String,AIGuard.NET.Models.ValidationContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the specified content asynchronously.
member.param: The text content to validate.
The validation context providing additional metadata.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A indicating the outcome of the validation.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the EmailRegex method.

member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.EmailRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IsBoundary(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified index is a boundary.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IsWordChar(System.Char)
member.summary: Determines whether the character is part of the [\w] set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_2068FF03FEFFFF87FEFFFF07
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "%+-.0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_60FF03FEFFFF07FEFFFF07
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "-.0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_FEFFFF07FEFFFF17
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz|".
